prompt: Our Google Ads account shows an average Quality Score of 4/10 across our top 20 keywords. Click-through rate is 1.2% against an industry benchmark of 3.5% for our category. What specifically is driving the low Quality Score and what are the exact steps to improve it within 30 days?
_note: Tests whether the persona correctly identifies the three Quality Score components (expected CTR, ad relevance, landing page experience) and provides specific remediation steps for each.
